_comment: Live MCP servers exposed to council agents. Activated only when MCP_CONFIG_PATH points here (settings.mcp_enabled). Secrets use ${VAR} expanded from the process env. Connection failures are swallowed — a broken server just hides its tools.

expose.description: Query REAL W&B/Weave traces from this project as evidence — counts, latency, models, errors. Use it to ground claims about whether the harness actually works.
